description: Immerse yourself in the enchanting city of Budapest, where the stunning architecture, relaxing thermal baths, and breathtaking night views come together to create an unforgettable experience. Over six days, you and your friends will explore the vibrant streets, indulge in local cuisine, and unwind in the city's famous spas, all while capturing the beauty of this photogenic destination. Get ready for a journey filled with culture, relaxation, and stunning vistas that will leave you in awe.

activities.description: Start your Budapest adventure with a hearty meal at Paprika, known for its authentic Hungarian dishes. Try the goulash soup for a true taste of local cuisine!
Explore the historic Buda Castle, a UNESCO World Heritage site. The castle offers stunning views of the city and the Danube River, making it a perfect spot for photography enthusiasts.
Take a leisurely walk across the iconic Chain Bridge, connecting Buda and Pest. The views of the Danube and the Parliament building are breathtaking, especially in the afternoon light.
Unwind in the famous Széchenyi Thermal Bath, one of the largest spa complexes in Europe. Enjoy the warm thermal waters and beautiful architecture, a perfect way to relax after a day of sightseeing.
End your day with dinner at the stunning New York Café, often referred to as the most beautiful café in the world. Enjoy a mix of traditional and modern Hungarian dishes in a luxurious setting.

activities.activity: Night view of the Danube River
activities.description: After dinner, take a night stroll along the Danube River. The illuminated buildings, including the Parliament and Buda Castle, create a magical atmosphere that is perfect for photos.
Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Café Gerbeaud, one of Budapest's most famous coffee houses. Enjoy a selection of pastries and strong Hungarian coffee in a beautifully historic setting.
Visit the iconic Fisherman's Bastion, known for its stunning panoramic views of the Danube and the Parliament building. The fairy-tale architecture makes it a perfect spot for photos.
Savor traditional Hungarian dishes at Pest-Buda Bistro, located near the Buda Castle. The cozy atmosphere and authentic flavors will give you a true taste of local cuisine.
Explore the stunning Matthias Church, known for its colorful tiled roof and intricate interior. This Gothic masterpiece is a must-see while in Buda.
Take a leisurely hike up Gellért Hill for breathtaking views of the city. The trek is rewarding, and you can enjoy the lush greenery along the way.
Unwind at the famous Gellért Thermal Bath, known for its stunning Art Nouveau architecture and relaxing thermal waters. A perfect way to rejuvenate after a day of sightseeing.
Enjoy dinner at Kiosk Budapest, a trendy restaurant with a vibrant atmosphere. The menu features a mix of Hungarian and international dishes, perfect for a satisfying meal after a long day.
End your day with a magical night walk along the Danube River. The illuminated buildings, including the Parliament and Buda Castle, create a breathtaking backdrop for photos.
Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Café Gerbeaud, one of Budapest's most famous coffee houses. Enjoy a selection of pastries and a rich cup of coffee in a beautifully historic setting.

Relax and rejuvenate at Széchenyi Thermal Bath, one of the largest and most famous thermal baths in Europe. Enjoy the outdoor pools and various saunas, surrounded by stunning neo-baroque architecture.
Savor traditional Hungarian cuisine at Paprika, known for its hearty goulash and other local dishes. The cozy atmosphere makes it a perfect spot to refuel after your thermal bath experience.
Visit Heroes' Square, a UNESCO World Heritage site, featuring iconic statues of Hungary's national leaders. Take a leisurely stroll around the square and enjoy the surrounding park.
Explore the beautiful City Park adjacent to Heroes' Square. Enjoy a peaceful walk, or relax by the lake, and take in the picturesque views of the Vajdahunyad Castle.
Indulge in a luxurious dinner at the New York Café, often referred to as the most beautiful café in the world. The opulent decor and exquisite menu make for a memorable dining experience.
End your day with a scenic walk along the Danube Promenade. Enjoy breathtaking views of the illuminated Buda Castle and the Chain Bridge, capturing the essence of Budapest's stunning night skyline.
Start your day at the iconic Café Gerbeaud, famous for its delicious pastries and rich coffee. Enjoy a slice of their famous Esterhazy torte while soaking in the elegant atmosphere.
Visit St. Stephen's Basilica, one of Budapest's most stunning landmarks. Climb to the dome for breathtaking panoramic views of the city, especially beautiful in the morning light.
Savor a delightful lunch at Borkonyha, a Michelin-starred restaurant known for its innovative Hungarian cuisine and extensive wine selection. The cozy ambiance makes it a perfect spot to relax.
Take a guided tour of the Hungarian State Opera, a masterpiece of Neo-Renaissance architecture. Learn about its history and enjoy the stunning interiors, which are a photographer's dream.
Wander down Andrássy Avenue, a UNESCO World Heritage site lined with beautiful buildings, shops, and cafés. It's a great place for photos and to soak in the city's architectural beauty.
Enjoy dinner at Menza, a trendy restaurant in the heart of Budapest. The menu features modern takes on traditional Hungarian dishes, and the vibrant atmosphere is perfect for a fun evening.
Experience the breathtaking beauty of Budapest's skyline on a night cruise along the Danube River. The illuminated buildings, including the Parliament and Buda Castle, create a magical atmosphere.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Café Gerbeaud, one of Budapest's most famous coffee houses. Enjoy a slice of their famous Esterhazy torte alongside a rich coffee in a beautifully historic setting.

Explore the Great Market Hall, a vibrant hub of local life. Here, you can sample traditional Hungarian foods, shop for souvenirs, and soak in the lively atmosphere. Don't miss trying some lángos, a deep-fried flatbread topped with sour cream and cheese!
Enjoy a hearty lunch at Fakanál, located within the Great Market Hall. This restaurant offers a variety of traditional Hungarian dishes, perfect for refueling after your market exploration.

Wander through the historic Jewish Quarter, where you can visit the stunning Dohány Street Synagogue, the largest in Europe. The area is rich in history and culture, with many street art pieces and cozy cafes to discover.

Unwind at Széchenyi Thermal Bath, one of the largest spa complexes in Europe. Enjoy the warm thermal waters and beautiful architecture, making it a perfect spot to relax and rejuvenate after a day of exploring.
Savor a traditional Hungarian dinner at Paprika, known for its authentic goulash and other local specialties. The cozy atmosphere and friendly service make it a great place to end your day.

activities.activity: Night Walk along the Danube River
activities.description: Take a leisurely stroll along the Danube River to witness the breathtaking night views of the city. The illuminated Parliament building and Buda Castle create a magical backdrop, perfect for memorable photos.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Gerlóczy Café, a charming Parisian-style café known for its delicious pastries and coffee. The ambiance is perfect for a leisurely morning before your adventures.

Take a leisurely walk down Váci Street, Budapest's famous shopping street. Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere, browse local shops, and perhaps pick up some souvenirs. Don't forget to snap some photos of the stunning architecture along the way!
Head to the Central Market Hall for lunch, where you can sample traditional Hungarian dishes. Try some goulash or lángos while soaking in the lively market atmosphere.
After lunch, walk to the Liberty Bridge. This beautiful bridge offers stunning views of the Danube River and the city. It's a great spot for photos, especially with the backdrop of the Gellért Hill.

Indulge in a relaxing afternoon at the Gellért Thermal Bath, one of Budapest's most famous thermal baths. Enjoy the healing waters and stunning Art Nouveau architecture. It's the perfect way to unwind before your departure.

activities.activity: Dinner at a Danube River Cruise
activities.description: End your day with a scenic dinner cruise on the Danube River. Enjoy a delicious meal while taking in the breathtaking views of Budapest's illuminated skyline, including the Parliament and Buda Castle.

After dinner, head to Fisherman's Bastion for some night photography. The fairy-tale-like structure offers one of the best panoramic views of the city, especially at night when it’s beautifully lit up.
